title: Numesh Sector
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Numesh Sector''' was a sector on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] conquered and terraformed the planet into Yuuzhan'tar. It was governed by [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Zareb]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
